result.stdout:
Generates a diagnostic graph for FlowLite-based finite state machines (FSM).
Usage: flowlite-diag --source "<path-to-source-code>" --format "dot|mermaid"
       flowlite-diag -s "<path-to-source-code>" -f "dot|mermaid"
Options:
       --source,-s: Specifies the path to the project directory. (Default: <empty>)
       --format,-f: Specifies the export format of the output. Supported values: dot, mermaid. (Default: dot)

commands.payload:
